title: Spicy Earthy Tella
description: A weeknight Ethiopian dish featuring a combination of earthy flavors and paprika, gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine Gluten-Free Tella with Paprika, Garlic Powder, and Salt. Mix well.
Drizzle coconut oil over the mixture and mix until evenly coated.
Arrange the Tella mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper in an even layer.
Sprinkle Red Pepper Flakes evenly over the Tella mixture.
Place Black Olives on top of each piece of Tella. Arrange Fresh Basil Leaves around the edges for garnish.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy, then remove from oven.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
